arts.ttl: Chelsea have signed ‘next Lamine Yamal’ ahead of next season
arts.sum: Chelsea have won the race to sign highly-rated Sporting CP youngster Geovany Quenda, beating Manchester United to his signature in a deal that will see him arrive at Stamford Bridge in 2026. The winger had been Man United’s top target, with the Premier League giants eager to bring him to Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Flick discusses Gavi’s best position, reveals why he loves ‘great kid’ Fermín López
arts.sum: Two players who did step up in their absence in the midweek win over Osasuna were Gavi and Fermín López, who were excellent in all aspects of the game and will likely play a big part over the next few weeks as Barça make a push in all competitions. Hansi Flick was asked about both players in a press conference on Saturday, and he started by discussing what Gavi’s best position is and how much he impact the game with his ability to press and keep possession.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David latest: Barcelona 'in competition' with six Premier League clubs for 107-goal sharpshooter
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly facing competition from six Premier League clubs for Lille striker Jonathan David, including Manchester United, Chelsea and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Blues sign 'the new Lamine Yamal' in Geovany Quenda
arts.sum: Chelsea will have their own Lamine Yamal when Geovany Quenda joins in 2026, according to one of his former coaches. Chelsea sign 'the new Lamine Yamal'
